description: Add the gateway migration ledger and project write-canary identity.
statements: CREATE CONSTRAINT nacl_schema_migration_identity IF NOT EXISTS FOR (migration:SchemaMigration) REQUIRE (migration.component, migration.version) IS UNIQUE
CREATE CONSTRAINT nacl_gateway_canary_project IF NOT EXISTS FOR (canary:NaclGatewayCanary) REQUIRE canary.project_id IS UNIQUE
